message:
test(oracle): add 25 conformance tests (s306-s330), all pass

Coverage: window with NULLs, complex UPDATE SET, type coercion comparison,
three-way JOINs, expression functions, complex subquery patterns, savepoints,
integer overflow arithmetic, aggregates on empty tables, LIMIT/OFFSET edges,
boolean expression truth tables, INSERT DEFAULT VALUES, implicit type
affinity, nested aggregate expressions, ORDER BY+LIMIT, window ROWS frames,
subquery in HAVING, changes(), FK CASCADE, multiway compounds, string edges,
window PARTITION BY multiple, recursive CTE tree traversal, complex WHERE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
